MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GLADYS CURRY'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT [CCP SECTION 425.16]..
APPEARANCE: Joel Liberson, Esq. of Liberson & Wolford LLP 677-4110 for pltfs & opposing parties; Drexel A. Bradshaw, Esq. & Michael R. Bracamontes, Esq. of Bradshaw & Associates, P.C. 433-4800 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN THAT COMPLAINT ARISES SUBSTANTIALLY FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY, AND ANYWAY PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN SUFFICIENT PROBABILITY OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS. Plaintiff to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

Motion To Strike Citation To Action Apartment Association V. City Of Santa Monica Set Forth In The Reply Brief

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS ANNETTE SHELTON AND LARRY SHELTON'S Motion To Strike Defendant's Improper Citation To Action Apartment Association V. City Of Santa Monica Set Forth In The Reply Brief.
APPEARANCE: Joel Liberson, Esq. of Liberson & Wolford LLP 677-4110 for pltfs & moving parties; Drexel A. Bradshaw, Esq. & Michael R. Bracamontes, Esq. of Bradshaw & Associates, P.C. 433-4800 for deft & opposing party.
RULING: The Court grants plaintiffs motion to strike defendant's improper citation. Plaintiff to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
